zh.Monkton Farleigh, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾蒙可頓 法爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Carpenter於1535年5月5日出生在英國維爾爾時，他的父親William Carpenter14歲，母親Elizabeth Stockham15歲。他於1560年與Susanna Trevelyan在澳洲昆斯藍德泰爾康納爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1625年9月21日在英國英格蘭維爾爾馬登享年90歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Carpenter于1535年5月5日出生在英国維爾爾时，他的父亲William Carpenter14岁，母亲Elizabeth Stockham15岁。他于1560年与Susanna Trevelyan在澳大利亚昆斯藍德泰爾康納爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1625年9月21日在英国英格兰維爾爾馬登享年90岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Carpenter was born on 5 May 1535, in Wiltshire, England, his father, William Carpenter, was 14 and his mother, Elizabeth Stockham, was 15. He married Susanna Trevelyan in 1560, in Tyrconnel, Queensland, Australia. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 21 September 1625, in Marden, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Carpenter est né le 5 mai 1535, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Carpenter, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stockham, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Trevelyan en 1560, à Tyrconnel, Queensland, Australie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1625, à Marden, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

Er hat 1560 in Tyrconnel, Queensland, Australien Susanna Trevelyan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 21. September 1625 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Marden, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Carpenter è nato il il 5 maggio 1535 nel Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, William Carpenter, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stockham, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Trevelyan nel 1560, nel Tyrconnel, Queensland, Australia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 settembre 1625, nel Marden, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Carpenterが1535年5月5日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Carpenterは14歳，母Elizabeth Stockhamは15歳であった。1560年にオーストラリアクイーンスランドトイルコネルでSusanna Trevelyanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1625年9月21日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルデンで90歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Carpenter(이)가 1535년 5월 5일 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Carpenter(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stockham(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1560년 오스트레일리아 퀸슬랜드 타이르콘에서 Susanna Trevelyan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1625년 9월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 마든에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.5 May 1535–21 Sep 1625: 5 de maio de 1535–21 de setembro de 1625
pt.Amesbury, Essex, Massachusetts, United S: Amesbury, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América
pt.St. Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Carpenter nasceu em 5 de maio de 1535, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Carpenter, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stockham, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Trevelyan em 1560, em Tyrconnel, Queensland, Austrália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1625, em Marden, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 90 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.St. Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Carpenter родился 5 мая 1535 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Carpenter было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stockham, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Trevelyan в 1560 г. в местности тирконнель, куинсланд, Австралия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 21 сентября 1625 г. в местности марден, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.5 May 1535–21 Sep 1625: 5 de mayo de 1535–21 de septiembre de 1625
es.St. Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Carpenter nació el 5 de mayo de 1535, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Carpenter, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stockham, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Susanna Trevelyan en 1560, en Tyrconnel, Queensland, Australia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1625, en Marden, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
